title: Kaattu Chedikku Lyrics Pathinaaru Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Karthik Raja
Song: Kaattu Chedikku
Lyrics : Snehan
Movie Name : Pathinaaru

Kaattu Chedikku kaval kidachache
Kaatu-kulla paadam padichache
Romba palaya ulagam
Ippa pudhusa theriyudhey
Adi aathi idndha rathathirku perenna
Idhu anbu thaane verenna

Kaattu Chedikku kaval kidachache
Kaatu-kulla paadam padichache

Paruthi panja pola manasu
Pacha thanni pola vayasu
Paasam thavira yedhum theriyadhe..
Poigal illa veru ulagam
Poti indri nenjam palagum
Vanmurai-ku velai kidayadhe...
Uppu moota erikondu
oora suthi parkum podhu
Thappu thanda edhum indri
Payanam thodarudhe

Adi aathi manam thuli thuli kudikudhe
sudhi yethi dhinam kathu-pola parakudhe

Pallikooda padam namaku
Sollidadha vazhkai iruku
Andha padam ingae nadakiradhe
Anbu onre sami kanaku
Adhuku eedu enna iruku
Kodutham vaangum manidham jeikiradhe...
Otha paruka aanapodhum
Paguthu unnum nenjam thaan
Kadhal indri kadhalodu
Magizhum manasuthaan

Adi aathi rendum vetkapattu sirikdhe
Sugam yethi ellai thaandi parakudhe

Kaattu Chedikku kaval kidachache
Kaatu-kulla paadam padichache

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaattu Chedikku?

The song captures themes of nostalgia and motivation, reflecting on past experiences and personal growth.

Who composed the music for Pathinaaru?

The music for Pathinaaru was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Who is the singer of Kaattu Chedikku?

The song is sung by Karthik Raja.

What is the release year of the movie Pathinaaru?

The movie Pathinaaru was released in 2010.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song plays a significant role in conveying the protagonist's journey and emotional growth.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaattu Chedikku from the movie Pathinaaru is a soothing melody that evokes nostalgia and motivation. Sung by Karthik Raja, it beautifully captures the essence of personal growth and reflection. The lyrics by Snehan delve into themes of love and self-discovery, set against Yuvan's enchanting musical backdrop. This song serves as a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's emotional journey and inner transformation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soothing melody of Kaattu Chedikku from the movie Pathinaaru, where Yuvan's enchanting music meets Karthik Raja's soulful voice. This song beautifully captures the essence of nostalgia and motivation, making it a timeless piece. Dive into the lyrical brilliance penned by Snehan and let the music transport you to a serene world.
stanzaMeanings: The forest plant got protection, learned lessons in the wild. The old world now seems new. What name to give this ancient blood? It's love, what else?
The forest plant got protection, learned lessons in the wild.

The heart is like cotton, age is like fresh water. Knows nothing but affection. A world without lies, the heart gets used to no competition. No place for violence. When carrying a salt sack and looking around the town, the journey continues without any mistakes.
The ancient mind drinks drop by drop, gaining wisdom, flying like the wind every day.

The school lessons don't teach us about life. That lesson is happening here. Love is the only divine calculation. What compares to it? Giving and taking, people succeed. Even when sharing a single piece, the heart divides and enjoys. A heart that rejoices in love without love.
The ancient pair shyly smiles, flying beyond limits with happiness.
The forest plant got protection, learned lessons in the wild.
